response.original_title: ಥ_ಥXfinity Call Back Request – Skip Hold Times
response.overview: Call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️ – Q: How do I request a call back from Xfinity without waiting on hold? A: Call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️ and say "callback" when the automated system gives you the estimated wait time. For live help, call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️.  Call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️ – Q: Does the Xfinity app always offer a callback option? A: Most of the time, yes, call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️. If not, use the chat assistant or call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️ for manual callback scheduling.  Call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️ – Q: How long does it take for Xfinity to call back? A: Typically 5 to 45 minutes depending on call volume, call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️. For estimated wait times, call ☎️1➟866⇷(240)↝3377☎️.
